items.title: Jupiter drops 13% as fees slide 29% – Can THIS zone save JUP?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jupiter's fee decline and significant drop in value could impact liquidity and trading activity on the Solana network.

items.title: Polymarket Taps Jupiter Exec to Lead Japan Push: Report
items.whyYouShouldCare: Polymarket's leadership change signals a strategic expansion into Japan, potentially increasing user engagement and transaction volume on Solana.

items.title: Why is Bitcoin falling despite pro-crypto Kevin Warsh becoming Fed chair?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Bitcoin's price drop, despite favorable regulatory news, may influence overall market sentiment and liquidity dynamics affecting Solana's ecosystem.
